title: Bridge Essay: Spirituality and quality of life in epilepsy and other chronic neurological disorders.
concept: Self-transcendence — mystical experience, cosmic consciousness, awe, numinous in neuroscience.

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Visionary Cosmologies** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Self-transcendence — mystical experience, cosmic consciousness, awe, numinous in neuroscience.

**Spirituality and quality of life in epilepsy and other chronic neurological disorders.** - Epilepsy Behav (2019). DOI: 10.1016/j.yebeh.2019.01.035. PMID: 30851485. PURPOSE: The patients with neurological disorders often report a different quality of life (QoL), which is in part explained by clinical-pathological or psychosocial variables. This study evaluated spirituality in patients with chronic brain pathologies, aiming to clarify its specificity and position to a multidimensional model of QoL. METHODS: A hundred and ninety-nine adult patients with epilepsy (E) (n = 88), mild cognitive impairment (MCI) (n = 32), ischemic vascular disorders (n = 29), tumo
